check_launcher_type.title: Detect launcher type
check_launcher_type.description: Identifying which game launcher is being used to determine the appropriate troubleshooting path.

branch_by_launcher.title: Launcher identified
branch_by_launcher.description: Routing to launcher-specific troubleshooting steps based on the detected launcher.

check_steam_process.title: Check Steam web helper
check_steam_process.description: Checking whether Steam's web helper processes are running correctly.

fix_restart_launcher.title: Restart launcher processes
fix_restart_launcher.description: Launcher processes appear to be stuck or not running. Restarting the Wine server and relaunching may resolve the issue.

check_steam_download.title: Check Steam download settings
check_steam_download.description: Checking for download configuration issues that can cause Steam to stall or fail.

show_steam_download_info.title: Steam download region
show_steam_download_info.description: Try changing your Steam download region in Steam Settings > Downloads. Select a region closer to your location or try a different region if downloads are stalling.

check_launcher_env.title: Check launcher environment
check_launcher_env.description: Verifying that environment variables are correctly configured for launcher compatibility.

fix_launcher_env.title: Fix launcher environment
fix_launcher_env.description: Applying known launcher compatibility fixes for Wine on macOS.

check_generic_env.title: Check general launcher environment
check_generic_env.description: Checking general environment configuration for launcher compatibility.

verify_fix.title: Did this fix the launcher issue?
verify_fix.description: Try launching the program again to check whether the issue is resolved.

escalate.title: Additional diagnostics needed
escalate.description: The automated launcher checks have not resolved the issue. Enhanced diagnostics or a support report may help identify the problem.

resolved.title: Problem resolved
resolved.description: The launcher issue has been fixed. You can export a session report for your records.
